column6: Identifies Order contains Products that are Partner Subscriptions
column9:
Connects Custom Object Partner Subscriptions to Order Line Item

Quote Line Items where QuoteLineItem.Partner_Subscriptions__c EQUALS TRUE should NOT be created as Order Item Records. They should ONLY show up in the Partner Subscription related list on the Order Item record with the following information:
- Partner Subscription Name
- Product Name
- Quantity
- Opportunity
- Quote
- Quote Line Item
- Order
- Order Item
- Contract
- Asset

Do_Not_Sync__c MUST be checked for these Order Items
